title: Handcrafted Pop Up Storybook Travel Diorama AI
sourceTitle: Handcrafted Pop Up Storybook Travel Diorama AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Handcrafted 3D pop-up storybook travel poster for Marrakech old medina unfolding from a vintage book with layered paper arches, market stalls, palms, patterned tiles and tiny travelers, preserving the opened vintage-book diorama mechanism. Subject: Marrakech old medina unfolding from a vintage book with layered paper arches, market stalls, palms, patterned tiles and tiny travelers rises from the book pages as the central destination world, with landmarks, streets, cultural details, tiny visitors, and layered miniature architecture. Scene: warm sunset paper diorama with decorative page corners, small lanterns, birds and handcrafted miniature street life frames the book as a premium collectible travel object with paper sky, clouds, ornaments, page details, and dimensional foreground craft. Composition: The open vintage book fills a vertical travel-poster frame; the destination rises upward from the page fold in layered foreground, middle-ground, and background depth; a decorative title banner stays readable near the top. Signature Elements: Opened vintage book, rising destination diorama, famous landmarks, traditional streets, bridges, rivers, local transportation, food stalls, miniature travelers, flying aircraft, hot-air balloons, paper clouds, decorative sun, flowers, wildlife, and regional cultural ornaments. Style: Hyper-detailed handcrafted paper-craft artistry with intricate layered papercut construction, whimsical storybook fantasy, premium children-book illustration polish, and museum-quality miniature engineering. Color Palette: Vibrant travel-poster color with warm cheerful daylight, rich regional accents, clean blue-sky paper tones, soft cream page colors, and balanced contrast between paper layers. Lighting: Soft daylight with warm dimensional shadows between paper layers, crisp highlights on folded paper edges, and a magical cheerful atmosphere. Materials: Ultra-realistic paper textures, layered cardstock, papercut architecture, origami decorations, embossed page corners, and handcrafted miniature props. Typography: MARRAKECH / GOLDEN SOUK appears on the decorative pop-up title banner as clean readable travel-poster text. Restrictions: Keep the destination coherent, the paper-engineered construction clear, the title banner readable, the open-book structure dominant, and every detail visibly made from layered paper;
